title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Intel Mark Ltd
body: "Application number 5403  Applicant Intel Corporation objected to the name used by Intel Mark Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 16 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Intel Mark Ltd is changed to 16177080, Ltd. "
